cobbler.fallback_reason: Subagent delegation is unavailable for this run.

acceptance.criterion: Delegated sessions that do not declare explicit handoff v1 retain the v2.8 advisory-only missing-packet behavior and exit successfully when all established acceptance checks pass.
acceptance.evidence: Category tests test_validate_warns_for_delegated_run_without_explicit_handoff, test_validate_warns_for_all_delegated_driver_spellings_without_handoff, test_host_native_full_run_scope_remains_silent_without_handoff, and test_validate_silent_for_host_native_and_absent_driver pass; the exact-tip 1,132-test strict gate also passes.

acceptance.criterion: A declared handoff v1 accepts exact fresh-start and resume state while blocking malformed state, ownership gaps/overlap, repository identity drift, and non-ancestor completed-slice commits.
acceptance.evidence: Fresh-start and resume acceptance tests pass together with ownership gap/overlap, branch drift, malformed state, and non-ancestor completed-slice rejection tests in tests/test_acceptance_contract.py.

acceptance.criterion: Markdown and JSON worker packets carry equivalent handoff state and acceptance mappings; capsule placement and packet size are bounded and fail closed with stable diagnostics.
acceptance.evidence: Equivalent Markdown and JSON packet tests pass; byte-zero capsule placement, canonical 1 MiB bound, packet/session identity, criterion drift, and single malformed-JSON diagnostic cases are covered and green.

acceptance.criterion: SKILL, schema/template guidance, changelog, and durable architecture/gotcha docs describe the opt-in boundary and explicitly preserve exact-session prewalk semantics.
acceptance.evidence: SKILL.md, AGENTS.md, README.md, references/schema-and-acceptance.md, templates, CHANGELOG.md, guide/index.html, and .ai-docs guidance document opt-in strictness and explicitly deny prewalk continuity; consistency policy and mutation tests pass.

acceptance.criterion: Focused acceptance tests and the repository's broad terminal verification pass on the current branch tip.
acceptance.evidence: 130 focused acceptance/consistency tests pass. python3 scripts/verify_repo.py --ci --version 2.9.0 --base-ref origin/main passed at reviewed tip 1195daa with 1,132 tests, links, release, public API, secret scan, installed smokes, and cumulative diff checks.

acceptance.criterion: Source metadata, changelog, README examples, public guide, and the release checklist agree on v2.9.0 with an empty Unreleased section.
acceptance.evidence: SKILL.md and AGENTS.md metadata, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, guide/index.html, context index, and maintainer commands agree on 2.9.0; Unreleased is empty and release_checklist.py --version 2.9.0 reports no failures.

master_acceptance.criterion: The cumulative diff preserves every established v2.8 staging/prewalk invariant while making explicitly declared handoff state deterministic and fail-closed.
master_acceptance.evidence: Cumulative review from origin/main checked advisory compatibility, strict opt-in state, Git ancestry/identity, packet bounds/placement, format parity, ownership partitioning, and prewalk separation; it found and fixed the decimal-vs-binary packet limit and duplicate malformed-JSON diagnostics before the final strict pass.

master_acceptance.criterion: The acceptance-bearing branch tip is current, documented, broadly verified, clean, and presented as a reviewable PR.
master_acceptance.evidence: PR #81 is ready for review and mergeable. On reviewed tip 1195daa, local strict verification and all hosted Repo Consistency matrix, CodeQL, and Socket checks pass; the worktree is clean and PR comments/reviews are empty.

continuation_guard.next_required_action: Commit and push the acceptance-backed Close, re-read the survival guide, run final-readiness and landing checks on the committed evidence tip, then remove operational run artifacts.
